query: 规模top100基金中本年以来收益最高的10只是哪些

args.sql: WITH top100 AS ( SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, fund_size FROM fund_size WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size) ORDER BY fund_size DESC LIMIT 100 ) SELECT t.fund_code AS 基金代码, t.fund_name AS 基金名称, t.fund_company AS 基金公司, ROUND(t.fund_size, 2) AS 基金规模_亿元, ROUND(p.portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS 本年收益率_pct FROM top100 t JOIN fund_performance p ON t.fund_code = p.fund_code WHERE p.period = '本年以来' ORDER BY p.portfolio_return DESC LIMIT 10

plan.rationale: 从最新规模日期取前100大基金，再关联本年以来业绩，按组合收益率降序取前10

notes: 规模日期取最新：date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size)
业绩区间默认为'本年以来'
从最新规模日期取前100大基金，再关联本年以来业绩，按组合收益率降序取前10
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。
